news.t: Navigating Market Volatility: Nuveen Launches 2 New Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: NGIF is an equity ETF with a total of 80 individual holdings. The top holdings are Entergy stock at 6.16%, NextEra Energy at 5.21%, Xcel Energy at 4.95%, American Electric Power Company at 4.32%, and The Williams Companies at 3.05%.

overview.description: The Nuveen Global Infrastructure Fund ETF (NGIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks to provide long-term growth of capital and income by actively investing in stocks globally of infrastructure-related companies. Investments focus on companies that own or operate critical infrastructure assets NGIF was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by Nuveen.

data.title: Navigating Market Volatility: Nuveen Launches 2 New Active ETFs
data.text: Nuveen expanded its suite of active ETFs on June 3, introducing the Nuveen Dividend Growth Fund (NUDG) and Nuveen Global Infrastructure Fund (NGIF) on the NYSE. NUDG, with an expense ratio of 0.
